records.name: Neon Rain
records.summary: Ordinary rain turns signage into liquid ghosts and reveals every moving light.

records.name: Static Mist
records.summary: Charged fog causes cheap implants and drones to stutter.

records.name: Acid Drizzle
records.summary: Weak corrosive rain drives crowds under awnings and punishes exposed gear.

records.name: Heat Bloom
records.summary: A trapped thermal inversion makes tower exhaust settle over the streets.

records.name: Stormlight Front
records.summary: A bright electrical storm turns the skyline theatrical and dangerous.

records.name: Smog Dawn
records.summary: Morning light arrives filtered through particulates and rooftop ad glare.
